source: American Academy of Otolaryngology-Head and Neck Surgery
title: Clinical Practice Guideline: Nosebleed (Epistaxis)
license_notes: Use as source-support metadata only. Do not copy guideline text into primitives.
supports: Epistaxis management should distinguish severity, recurrence, and need for packing or procedural care.
Clinician evaluation should account for anticoagulation, bleeding risk, and recurrent bleeding.
This source is clinician-facing and supports boundary design rather than direct patient-facing wording.
